title: Y@zav'el #3149
definition:
Jeziel = "the assembly of God"

 1) a Benjamite and one of David's mighty warriors who joined him at
    Ziklag
nasbUsage:

 1) a Benjamite and one of David's mighty warriors who joined him at
    Ziklag
